{{Quote|It's a ''trap!''|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 34">[[Star Wars (1977) 34|''Star Wars'' (1977) 34]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars 34: Thunder in the Stars''''' is the thirty-fourth issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
After his defeat at the hands of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in a duel of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]], [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]] has gone into a state of shock and is kept under heavy sedation on the orders of his brother [[Silas Tagge/Legends|Silas Tagge]]. While [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] is leading the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] to [[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]] under the impression that the [[Omega Frost/Legends|Omega Frost]] is going to be unleashed on their supply planet. But that was a ruse, in reality the weapon is targeting the [[Feswe Corridor|Junction asteroid corridor]] just as the fleet is to pass through it. Luke had escaped from the Tagges but his ship has been sabotaged and he is forced to abandon his craft before in crashes into one of the asteroids. With no way to warn the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] that they are entering into a trap, he finds and destroys one of the towers which generates the Omega Frost effect just as the Rebel fleet is entering the weapon's range. The fleet then changes course to attack the Tagges' [[Mining Explorer]] destroying the ship before Silas and Orman can escape.
